title: pterocypsela indica var. indivisa
intro: Pterocypsela indica var. indivisa, also known as the Himalayan pterocypsela, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving digestive issues, and exhibiting potential anti-cancer properties. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in herbal formulations to leverage its medicinal properties.
